title: Could a Dummy System have been made with Shinji or Asuka
display_title: Could a Dummy System have been made with Shinji or Asuka
wikitext:
[]: Could a Dummy System have been made with Shinji or Asuka?             Quote Post by Replicator » Sun Nov 11, 2012 9:19 pm The Dummy Plug Systems were all developed with Rei and Kaworu, that mimic thought patterns of the pilots. Except those were the only two (known ones, at least) made. Rei and Kaworu are technically Seeds in Lilin-shaped bodies, and I remember reading that Rei could theoretically sync with any EVA, as well as Kaworu and Unit-02 in Episode 24. Could a Dummy System have been made in a similar process with Shinji, Asuka, or any other pilot?

[]:             Quote Post by Lurkis » Sun Nov 11, 2012 9:37 pm I don't see why you couldn't make a dummy system out of other pilots, all it does is copy the thought process of a conciousness enough to activate an Eva. I think the real problem would come from trying to get a dummy system made from Asuka or Shinji to sync with the residing soul in other Eva's. Kaworu has been seen to pass this so long as the soul is dormant and as you said, Rei theoretically could as well.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Nov 11, 2012 11:13 pm What Lurkis said. Rei and Kaworu-based Dummy Plugs are best since it seems they can sync with any other EVA. An Asuka Dummy Plug could probably work, but probably only for Unit 02.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Mon Nov 12, 2012 12:26 am Like Aura and Lurkis said there shouldn't be any problems making a dummy plug based of any of the other pilots but the problem would be trying to sync the plug with the Eva's soul.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Nov 12, 2012 1:00 pm Well, there is that conversation in Episode 14 that suggests that Ritsuko and Maya were seriously contemplating the creation of a Shinji-quarium, which is why they tried sticking him in EVA 00 (since he already sucessfully used EVA 02) to see if it works. Maya: "As expected, his synch rate is lower than with EVA 01" Ritsuko: "It's still good enough to carry out our plan." Maya: "...You mean the dummy system?"

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Nov 12, 2012 3:07 pm Kendrix wrote: Maya: "As expected, his synch rate is lower than with EVA 01" Ritsuko: "It's still good enough to carry out our plan." Maya: "...You mean the dummy system?"

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Nov 12, 2012 3:58 pm The Shinjis in the Shinjiquarium would of course have tits.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Nov 12, 2012 6:28 pm The "Shinjiquarium" sounds like something a really rabid fangirl would wish for on Christmas....

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 13, 2012 2:12 am It's not like we aren't shown it later

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Nov 13, 2012 5:54 am Shinji wants to be a girl.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Nov 13, 2012 1:39 pm Shinji should have been a girl. On topic, Kaworu's ability to merge with Evangelions looked to me like something related to his soul rather than his mere thought pattern, honestly all the stuff about pilots being incompatible with other Evas always made little sense to me, I see a lot of contradictions...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 13, 2012 3:46 pm According to Kaworu, his ability to manipulate Eva-02 stems from the fact that Eva-02 is also of Adam's flesh, and because Kyoko's soul has shut itself away. Rei is not of Adam's flesh, so the same logic wouldn't apply to her, unless... Ultimately, the Seeds may have fundamentally identical bodies.* This explains, first of all, why a clone of Lilith (Eva-01) looks like a clone of Adam. It also could provide explanation, if you press your brain enough, for why a Rei dummy plug was considered compatible with both Eva-01 and Eva-02. Rei would have an intrinsic connection with both due to her residence in Lilith, who is effectively Adam's twin. *(Lilith's unusual appearance is probably not her inherent biological one.)

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Nov 13, 2012 4:08 pm Reichu wrote: According to Kaworu, his ability to manipulate Eva-02 stems from the fact that Eva-02 is also of Adam's flesh, and because Kyoko's soul has shut itself away. Rei is not of Adam's flesh, so the same logic wouldn't apply to her, unless...

[]:             Quote Post by Replicator » Tue Nov 13, 2012 4:38 pm Reichu wrote: Ultimately, the Seeds may have fundamentally identical bodies.* This explains, first of all, why a clone of Lilith (Eva-01) looks like a clone of Adam. It also could provide explanation, if you press your brain enough, for why a Rei dummy plug was considered compatible with both Eva-01 and Eva-02. Rei would have an intrinsic connection with both due to her residence in Lilith, who is effectively Adam's twin. *(Lilith's unusual appearance is probably not her inherent biological one.)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 13, 2012 4:48 pm Replicator : Where was it shown in episode 24 that the Seeds have similar attributes? In any case, it may be best to continue the "Lilith's true form" discussion elsewhere. Hyper Shinchan: As far as I know, the dummy plug synchronizes in a similar manner as a regular pilot, whereas Kaworu is able to "control" his synch rate, and even "pilot" the Eva without stepping foot in the entry plug. Hence, a dummy plug's level of mastery over an Eva is less than Kaworu's over an Eva who has "shut her soul away". I don't know if that makes any sense at all, but it's all I got right now.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Tue Nov 13, 2012 8:37 pm Reichu wrote: Hence, a dummy plug's level of mastery over an Eva is less than Kaworu's over an Eva who has "shut her soul away". I don't know if that makes any sense at all, but it's all I got right now.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Nov 13, 2012 9:08 pm Kendrix wrote: Well, there is that conversation in Episode 14 that suggests that Ritsuko and Maya were seriously contemplating the creation of a Shinji-quarium, which is why they tried sticking him in EVA 00 (since he already sucessfully used EVA 02) to see if it works.
